name: property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate utility bill payments cause cash flow gaps. We track and reconcile utility bill payments instead of manual tracking of utility bills and contracts.
problem_solved: Inaccurate utility bill payments leading to financial discrepancies.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate utility bill payments leading to financial discrepancies.
